diagnostics.fixed_point_scale_effect: positive global scaling only; route ordering and physical travel-time ratios are unchanged
diagnostics.interpretation_warning: whole-trip average speeds are proxies, not observed per-edge speeds
diagnostics.smoothing: road-bucket speed -> road-global speed -> network trip-average speed
diagnostics.source: complete training road sequence plus whole-trip start/end timestamps

full_static_line_graph.selection_rule: maximum validation Edge F1; maximum Exact Match then earliest update break exact ties

full_time_conditioned_length_baseline.selection_rule: maximum validation Edge F1; maximum Exact Match then earliest update break exact ties

full_time_conditioned_travel_time_baseli.selection_rule: maximum validation Edge F1; maximum Exact Match then earliest update break exact ties

travel_time_baseline_minus_length_tempor.mean_regret_not_subtracted: direct costs use different length and scaled-time units

travel_time_model_minus_full_static.mean_regret_not_subtracted: direct costs use different length and scaled-time units

conclusions.scope: single fixed validation split; no independent test or formal statistical significance test
